title: Definition of Done — DeepWiki Coverage Expansion TDD

design_specific_gates.name: Workspace completeness
design_specific_gates.criteria: All required TDD workspace files exist under docs/technical-design/deepwiki-coverage-expansion/ and are non-empty.

design_specific_gates.name: Formal TDD structure
design_specific_gates.criteria: Final TDD includes header metadata, table of contents, goals/non-goals/future goals, metrics, requirements, architecture, detailed design, data contracts, interfaces, validation, implementation, rollout, operations, risks, alternatives, ADRs, and references.
design_specific_gates.validation_method: manual section review against TDD guide

design_specific_gates.name: Requirement coverage
design_specific_gates.criteria: All PRD Must requirements UR-01 through UR-12 and UR-15 are addressed by architecture, data contracts, validation, and implementation sections; Should requirements UR-13 and UR-14 are addressed or staged.
design_specific_gates.validation_method: cross-check final TDD against PRD and traceability matrix

design_specific_gates.name: Benchmark isolation
design_specific_gates.criteria: TDD explicitly states benchmark material is comparator-only and must not become citeable evidence, generated headings, copied prose, copied claims, or source truth.

design_specific_gates.name: Strict validator preservation
design_specific_gates.criteria: Design preserves or strengthens citation, malformed-token, unsupported-identifier, placeholder, truncation, context-artifact, generated coverage, evidence sufficiency, and freshness validators; no weakening is proposed.

design_specific_gates.name: Deterministic Phase 3
design_specific_gates.criteria: Phase 3 remains deterministic and LLM-free; page-level source selection and evidence retrieval are deterministic and fail closed.

design_specific_gates.name: Bounded repair policy
design_specific_gates.criteria: Repair is limited to LLM-authored page plans or claim plans, uses exact diagnostics, audit artifacts, hard attempt caps, and strict revalidation; no generic heal/retry loop or output patching is proposed.
design_specific_gates.validation_method: review design constraints, behavior, and rollout sections

design_specific_gates.name: Data contract specificity
design_specific_gates.criteria: TDD defines topic-catalog, hierarchical page-plan, relevant-source-map, evidence linkage, generated coverage, citation manifest, and coverage traceability artifacts with required fields and ownership.

design_specific_gates.name: Implementation readiness
design_specific_gates.criteria: TDD names likely existing and inferred modules to create/modify, phased milestones, tests, rollout, rollback, operations, and risks.
design_specific_gates.validation_method: review detailed design and execution readiness artifacts

design_specific_gates.name: JSON validity
design_specific_gates.criteria: JSON artifacts in the workspace parse successfully.
design_specific_gates.validation_method: python json parser over manifest, definition of done, intent, rightsize plan, validation report

implementation_acceptance_gates_from_des: Catalog gate: source-derived topic catalog exists, is deterministic, and excludes benchmark-only material.
Planning gate: hierarchy, page profiles, required content blocks, required topics, and source obligations are complete.
Source-selection gate: per-page relevant file/symbol/span/contract/test/doc handles are selected before Phase 3.
Evidence gate: every blocking topic/content block has sufficient exact citeable evidence before Phase 4.
Grounded rendering gate: pages render from validated grounded claim/token plans.
Generated coverage gate: every evidenced obligation maps to Markdown anchors and valid local citations.
Validator gate: all strict validators pass without weakening.
Freshness gate: downstream PASS artifacts fingerprint the exact plan/evidence artifacts consumed.
Benchmark isolation gate: comparison report is separate, non-citeable, and excluded from evidence gates.
Traceability gate: topic catalog to final output lineage is complete or explicitly deferred with reason.
